articles.title: Kenyan court blocks Trump admin from dumping Ebola-exposed Americans there
articles.description: The US has previously built specialized facilities just for this purpose.
articles.content: The Trump administration is refusing to repatriate Americans exposed to Ebola amid the outbreak still raging in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. But the plan to send US citizens to Kenya has hit a snag, and officials are still scrambling to find other countries that might take them.
